Interface IGCSShiftXform2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a GCS shift geodata transform.

[Guid("B0FACF1A-661A-46C6-B8FF-87450BFACEF9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGCSShiftXform2 : IGCSShiftXform, IGeodataXform
